name: Broccoli Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small bunch green onions, chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and chop fresh broccoli or cook frozen chopped broccoli. Drain and pat dry.
2. Melt butter and sauté sliced mushrooms, onions, and peppers in butter until wilted. Drain if necessary.
3. Beat eggs and salt together, then add milk and vegetables. Mix well.
4. Sprinkle cheese on the bottom of the pie crust and some on top of ingredients if desired.
5. Place vegetable mixture into the pie crust and bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 40 minutes. Quiche is done when it begins to set.
